ItacPersonItem.Notes: Man of letters and archaeologist, he received a degree in law at the University of Padua, but he did not practice law. He recited various poems in the Ricovrati Academy, which he joined in 1679.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
